page_content: SOCY410 Social Demography SOCY411 Demographic Techniques Electives 2 3 courses selected from the courses below. Up to two electives may be taken from outside of the Sociology Department. SOCY Courses SOCY335 Sociology of Health and Illness SOCY386 Experiential Learning SOCY412 Family Demography SOCY413 Sociology of Aging SOCY418 Research in Family & Demography SOCY428 Research in Inequality SOCY441 Social Stratiﬁcation and Inequality SOCY445 Sex and Love in Modern Society Non-SOCY courses (maximum of 2) AAST222 AAST498 Advanced Topics in Asian American Studies (AAST498B-Urban Demography and Community) ANTH265 Anthropology of Global Health AREC365 World Hunger, Population, and Food Supplies ECON315 Economic Development of Underdeveloped Areas EPIB301 Epidemiology for Public Health Practice FMSC381 Family Inequality GEOG335 NFSC425 3 3 9
